---
title: 'OSIM Meetup: RDM, OA, and Open Science Services'
categories: OSIM Meetup

event:
  card_description: "Raising awareness of LMU services on research data management, open access, and open science"
  start_date: 2023-10-13
  time: "14:00 CET"
  format:
    type: "Hybrid"
    details: "In-person & Online"
  language:
    primary: "English"
    primary-code: "en"

instructors: []

presenters:
  - name: "Dr. Martin Spenger"
    affiliation: "LMU University Library, RDM Help Desk"
  - name: "Dr. Veit Schwab"
    affiliation: "University Funding Unit, LMU Munich"
  - name: "Prof. Dr. Felix Schönbrodt"
    affiliation: "LMU Open Science Center"

contact: 
    name: "OSC team"
    email: "osc@lmu.de"

organizers:
  - name: "Prof. Dr. Anne-Laure Boulesteix"
  - name: "Dr. Christina Nießl"

host:
  - name: Open Science Initiative in Medicine
    abbreviation: OSIM
  
template: templates/event-template.html
filters:
    - templates/process-event-yaml.lua
---


## Event Details

**Speakers:** Dr. Martin Spenger (LMU University Library, RDM Help Desk), Dr. Veit Schwab (University Funding Unit), and Prof. Dr. Felix Schönbrodt (LMU Open Science Center)

**Date & Time:** 13 October 2023, 14:00 CET
